title: JustAWoolOverlay
description: A clean Bedwars / PVP wool overlay for focus and aesthetic.
body:
---

**JustAWoolOverlay – \[1.8.9+] Bedwars Wool Pack from Telly 100K (FULL CREDIT)**

A super lightweight pack that only changes wool textures — nothing else. Perfect for overlays or combining with your favorite PvP packs.

---

**Features:**

* Simplified, recolored wool textures
* Works as an overlay on top of any pack
* Great for Bedwars, bridging, or clean visuals
* No item, GUI, or sound changes

---

**Installation:**

1. Place this pack **above** your main PvP pack in the resource pack list
2. Enable both
3. Done — enjoy cleaner wool without affecting anything else

---

**Compatibility:**
✔ Works on 1.8.9+
✔ Compatible with all clients (Lunar, Badlion, Feather, etc.)

---
